ground_truth:
App: **Jan** (v0.8.2). **Three columns**: left nav sidebar + middle settings-category column (e.g. Appearance/Assistants-style entries) + right settings content. Top-right corner has the macOS traffic-light dots **plus extra icons** (download/grid/split-view). Provider-list entries carry **colored per-provider icons**.
- **Left nav**: window-control dots; items `New Chat` `⌘N`, `New Projects` `⌘P`, `Search` `⌘K`, `Hub`, `Settings` (active) — **keyboard shortcuts ARE shown** next to these items. Sections `Chats` (recent: "Build a PacMan Clone…", "Translate the following…", "interpreter"), `INTEGRATIONS` (`Experimental` tag, `MCP Servers`, `Claude Code`), `MODEL PROVIDERS` (`+` add; `LOCAL`: `Llama.cpp`, `MLX`; `REMOTE`: `OpenAI`, `Azure`, `Anthropic`, `OpenRouter`, `Mistral`, `Groq` (last fully-visible entry), `x.AI` (last entry, **truncated** — only the top ~40% visible; models often render it "xAI")).
- **Right (Settings)**: sections `General` (`App Version` `v0.8.2`; `Automatic Update Check` toggle **on** + button `Check for Updates` **enabled**; `Language` dropdown `English`), `Data Folder` (`App Data` path `/Users/frederic/Library/Application Support/Jan/data` + `Change Location`; `App Logs` + `Show in Finder` / `Open Logs`), `Advanced` (`Jan CLI` at `/Users/frederic/.local/bin/jan` + `Uninstall`; `Reset To Factory Settings` + red `Reset` button).

responses.content:
# (1) Overall Layout

- Left sidebar: Navigation menu with top-level items (New Chat, New Projects, Search, Hub, Settings) and a list of recent chats/projects.
- Main content area: Settings panel with a vertical tabbed navigation (General, Appearance, Assistants, etc.) on the left, and the selected settings content on the right.
- Top-left corner: macOS window control buttons (red, yellow, green).
- Top-right corner: Download and window resize icons.

# (2) Every Visible Component with Text Label Verbatim

- New Chat
- New Projects
- Search
- Hub
- Settings
- Chats
- Build a PacMan Clone ...
- Translate the following...
- interpreter
- General
- Appearance
- Assistants
- Attachments
- Local API Server
- HTTPS Proxy
- Shortcuts
- Hardware
- Privacy
- MCP Servers
- Claude Code
- Llama.cpp
- MLX
- OpenAI
- Azure
- Anthropic
- OpenRouter
- Mistral
- Groq
- App Version
- v0.8.2
- Automatic Update Check
- Automatically check for updates on startup and periodically.
- Check for Updates
- Check if a newer version of Jan is available.
- Check for Updates (button)
- Language
- English
- Data Folder
- App Data
- Location for messages, downloaded models and other data.
- /Users/frederic/Library/Application Support/Jan/data
- Change Location (button)
- App Logs
- View detailed logs of the App.
- Show in Finder (button)
- Open Logs (button)
- Advanced
- Jan CLI
- Installed at /Users/frederic/.local/bin/jan — use jan from your terminal to serve models.
- Uninstall (button)
- Reset To Factory Settings
- Restore application to its initial state, erasing all models and chat history. This action is irreversible and recommended only if the application is corrupted.
- Reset (button)

# (3) Any Feedback, Status, or Error Messages

- None visible.

# (4) Interactive Elements (Buttons, Inputs, Links) and Their State

- Toggle switch for "Automatic Update Check" — ON (red/orange).
- Button "Check for Updates" — enabled, grey.
- Dropdown for "Language" — set to "English", dropdown arrow visible.
- Button "Change Location" — enabled, grey.
- Button "Show in Finder" — enabled, grey.
- Button "Open Logs" — enabled, grey.
- Button "Uninstall" — enabled, grey.
- Button "Reset" — enabled, red, prominent.

- Top-left corner: macOS window controls (red, yellow, green buttons).
- Top-right corner: Download and window resize icons.
